title: WordPress SEO
description: Use clean WordPress SEO configuration, one metadata source, useful archives, XML sitemap, and optimized theme/plugin setup.
do: Manage indexability of archives, tags, authors, dates, and attachments.
Use one primary SEO plugin setup cleanly.
dont: Index thin tag/date/author archives unless useful.
Use multiple SEO plugins that output conflicting metadata.
Let page builders create bloated templates.
